headline: AI Data-Center Play Prologis Offers Entry. It Hiked Its Outlook Again.
summary: Industrial real estate investment trust and AI data-center play Prologis guided higher for 2026 on Thursday as growth accelerates. Shares jumped, offering an early entry. The S&P 500 real estate investment trust claims to be the largest real estate company in the world.
